allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', p.get\('version'\)\); print\('peerDeps:', p.get\('peerDependencies', {}\)\); print\('deps:', p.get\('dependencies', {}\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('zod version:', p['version']\)")
